2604.14216.title: Neuro-Oracle: A Trajectory-Aware Agentic RAG Framework for Interpretable Epilepsy Surgical Prognosis
2604.14216.paper_summary: Predicting post-surgical seizure outcomes in pharmacoresistant epilepsy is a clinical challenge. Conventional deep-learning approaches operate on static, single-timepoint pre-operative scans, omitting longitudinal morphological changes. We propose \emph{Neuro-Oracle}, a three-stage framework that: (i) distils pre-to-post-operative MRI changes into a compact 512-dimensional trajectory vector using a 3D Siamese contrastive encoder; (ii) retrieves historically similar surgical trajectories from a population archive via nearest-neighbour search; and (iii) synthesises a natural-language prognosis grounded in the retrieved evidence using a quantized Llama-3-8B reasoning agent. Evaluations are conducted on the public EPISURG dataset ($N{=}268$ longitudinally paired cases) using five-fold stratified cross-validation. Since ground-truth seizure-freedom scores are unavailable, we utilize a clinical proxy label based on the resection type. We acknowledge that the network representations may potentially learn the anatomical features of the resection cavities (i.e., temporal versus non-temporal locations) rather than true prognostic morphometry. Our current evaluation thus serves mainly as a proof-of-concept for the trajectory-aware retrieval architecture. Trajectory-based classifiers achieve AUC values between 0.834 and 0.905, compared with 0.793 for a single-timepoint ResNet-50 baseline. The Neuro-Oracle agent (M5) matches the AUC of purely discriminative trajectory classifiers (0.867) while producing structured justifications with zero observed hallucinations under our audit protocol. A Siamese Diversity Ensemble (M6) of trajectory-space classifiers attains an AUC of 0.905 without language-model overhead.
2604.14216.paper_summary_zh: 預測藥物抗性癲癇的手術後癲癇結果是一項臨床挑戰。傳統的深度學習方法基於靜態的單一時間點術前掃描，忽略了縱向形態變化。我們提出了 \emph{Neuro-Oracle}，一個三階段框架： (i) 使用3D Siamese對比編碼器將術前到術後的MRI變化提煉為一個緊湊的512維度軌跡向量； (ii) 通過最近鄰搜索從人口檔案中檢索歷史上相似的手術軌跡；以及 (iii) 使用量化的Llama-3-8B推理代理合成基於檢索證據的自然語言預後。評估是在公共EPISURG數據集上進行的（$N{=}268$ 縱向配對案例），使用五折分層交叉驗證。由於缺乏真實的癲癇無發作分數，我們利用基於切除類型的臨床代理標籤。我們承認，網絡表示可能潛在地學習切除腔體的解剖特徵（即，顳葉與非顳葉位置），而不是實際的預後形態學。因此，我們目前的評估主要作為對軌跡感知檢索架構的概念驗證。基於軌跡的分類器達到的AUC值介於0.834和0.905之間，而單一時間點的ResNet-50基準為0.793。Neuro-Oracle代理（M5）達到了純粹區分性軌跡分類器的AUC（0.867），同時在我們的審核協議下生成結構化的解釋且未觀察到任何幻覺。軌跡空間分類器的Siamese多樣性集成（M6）在沒有語言模型開銷的情況下達到AUC 0.905。
2604.14216.author: Aizierjiang Aiersilan et.al.
